summary: The diff implements REQ-1 by updating the Hero tagline in Hero.tsx to use font-extrabold weight with a Fraunces serif font and a warm amber-to-burnt-orange gradient color (#F5C842 to #E8900A to #C96A00) with drop-shadow glow. The Tailwind config and global CSS also confirm Fraunces is registered as the serif font family. All acceptance criteria appear to be addressed.
